Title: User Creation and Authentication
Preconditions: No active user session.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: testpassword
- Email: testuser@example.com
- Neighborhood: TestNeighborhood
- Photo: testphoto.jpg
- CompanyName: TestCompany
- CompanyDescription: TestDescription
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user creation page.
2. Enter username, password, email, neighborhood, photo, company name, and company description.
3. Click on the "Create User" button.
4. System checks if the user already exists.
5. If the user does not exist, system creates a new user.
6. System authenticates the user.
7. If credentials are valid, user is redirected to the home page.
8. If credentials are invalid, user is prompted to re-enter credentials.
Expected Result: - User is created and authenticated successfully, and redirected to the home page.

Title: User Creation Failure (Duplicate User)
Preconditions: No active user session.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: testpassword
- Email: testuser@example.com
- Neighborhood: TestNeighborhood
- Photo: testphoto.jpg
- CompanyName: TestCompany
- CompanyDescription: TestDescription
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user creation page.
2. Enter username, password, email, neighborhood, photo, company name, and company description.
3. Click on the "Create User" button.
4. System checks if the user already exists.
5. If the user already exists, system displays an error message.
Expected Result: - Error message displayed indicating that the user already exists.

Title: User Authentication Failure (Invalid Credentials)
Preconditions: No active user session.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter username and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. System checks if the credentials are valid.
5. If credentials are invalid, system displays an error message.
Expected Result: - Error message displayed indicating that the credentials are invalid.

Title: User Navigation Through Home Page
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - User clicks on different icons on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the profile photo.
2. System navigates to the user profile.
3. User clicks on the notification icon.
4. System navigates to the notification section.
5. User interacts with the map.
6. System navigates to the full screen map.
7. User clicks on the menu icon.
8. System navigates to the menu interaction.
9. User clicks on the home icon.
10. System navigates back to the home page.
11. User clicks on the personal profile icon.
12. System navigates to the user profile.
13. User clicks on the chat icon.
14. System navigates to the chat section.
15. User clicks on the general access icon.
16. System navigates to the general dashboard.
Expected Result: - User is navigated to the correct sections based on the icon clicks.

Title: Posting a New Post
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data:
- Post content: "Test post content"
- Neighborhood: TestNeighborhood
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the post button.
2. User enters post content and selects the neighborhood.
3. User clicks on the "Post" button.
4. System saves the post.
5. System displays the post on the user's profile.
Expected Result: - Post is successfully posted and displayed on the user's profile.

Title: Posting a New Post with Invalid Content
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the post button.
2. User enters empty post content and selects the neighborhood.
3. User clicks on the "Post" button.
4. System checks if the post content is valid.
5. If the post content is invalid, system displays an error message.
Expected Result: - Error message displayed indicating that the post content is invalid.

Title: Leaving a Comment on a Post
Preconditions: User is logged in and a post exists.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the post to view it.
2. User clicks on the comment button.
3. User enters comment content.
4. User clicks on the "Leave Comment" button.
5. System saves the comment.
6. System displays the comment under the post.
Expected Result: - Comment is successfully left and displayed under the post.

Title: Leaving a Comment with Invalid Content
Preconditions: User is logged in and a post exists.
Test Steps:

2. User clicks on the comment button.
3. User enters empty comment content.
4. User clicks on the "Leave Comment" button.
5. System checks if the comment content is valid.
6. If the comment content is invalid, system displays an error message.
